display.purpose: Hero typewriter only. Ubuntu Mono in the <code> element. Never used elsewhere.

headline.purpose: One h1 per section. About Me, Experience, Contact.

title.purpose: Role title in experience card. Component-level headings only.

body.purpose: About paragraph, experience summary. Cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Stat chip labels, company metadata. Large text only — #888888 at small sizes fails AA.

motion.name: label-reveal
motion.purpose: Contact label text reveal on icon hover. visibility/opacity avoids layout reflow.

motion.name: fade-in-top
motion.value: opacity 0→1 + translateY from above, via react-reveal/Fade
motion.purpose: Nav links staggered entrance on page load (0ms, 100ms, 200ms delay).

motion.name: typewriter
motion.purpose: Hero 'Hello World!' text. Pauses 500ms before starting.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Bootstrap md breakpoint. Nav icons arrange horizontally; contact labels become visible on hover.

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Fixed top nav link. White at rest, softens on hover. No background change.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; color: #ffffff; background: transparent; font-size: 1rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; text-decoration: none; transition: color 200ms ease; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #aaaaaa; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 2px; }

components.name: Experience Card
components.description: The site's only content card. Lifted Surface background. Header row + summary + stat chips.
components.html:
Software Engineer
Epic Systems · March 2023 – June 2026

Built full-stack features for MyChart Bedside, a patient-facing platform used by over 190 million people globally, across web, iOS, and Android.

190M+
users reached
15K+
patient e-cards sent
components.css: .ds-experience-card { background-color: #3a3b3c; border-radius: 8px; padding: 2rem; color: #ffffff; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-exp-header { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; } .ds-exp-text { } .ds-role { font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 0.2rem; } .ds-company { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #aaaaaa; } .ds-exp-summary { font-size: 0.95rem; color: #cccccc; margin-bottom: 2rem; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-stats { display: flex; gap: 2rem; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-stat { background-color: #2b2d2c; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; min-width: 160px; max-width: 220px; } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #888888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }

components.name: Stat Chip
components.description: Standalone stat display. Cold Concrete bg on Lifted Surface card — the 'punches through' effect.
components.css: .ds-stat-chip { background-color: #2b2d2c; border-radius: 8px; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; min-width: 160px; max-width: 220px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-chip-value { font-size: 1.3rem; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; } .ds-chip-label { font-size: 0.8rem; color: #888888; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; }

components.name: Contact Icon Link
components.description: SVG icon + hover-reveal label. The visibility/opacity pattern prevents layout reflow. Desktop only for label reveal.
components.css: .ds-contact-link { display: inline-flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-contact-svg { width: 3rem; height: auto; margin: 1rem; transition: transform 200ms ease; } .ds-contact-link:hover .ds-contact-svg { transform: scale(1.1); } .ds-contact-label { visibility: hidden; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 200ms ease; font-size: 1rem; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; text-align: center; } .ds-contact-link:hover .ds-contact-label { visibility: visible; opacity: 1; }

narrative.overview:
Brock Major's portfolio is built on a single conviction: the design gets out of the way so the person gets noticed. The palette is nearly monochromatic charcoal — dark, calm, achromatic. The atmosphere is a well-lit room where the work and the person are the only things in it. Nothing decorative enters without earning its place. Nothing shouts. Nothing performs.

This system explicitly rejects the generic dark Bootstrap portfolio with floating cards and no human voice; the overwrought creative portfolio with WebGL scenes and custom cursor trails; the cold corporate bio that reads like a LinkedIn summary; and the 'Hello World!' typewriter hero, which by 2026 is a cliché that has outlived any warmth it once had.

The system's biggest open gap is color: the current palette has no accent. This is a documented absence. Picking and committing to one accent is the highest-leverage move available.
keyCharacteristics: Near-monochromatic dark base — one background tone, one surface tone
No accent color (documented gap — the single biggest upgrade available)
System fonts everywhere except the hero mono — readable, fast, honest
Fluid type scale — every size adapts with the viewport
Flat-by-default elevation — surfaces lift by luminance delta, not box-shadow
Specificity carries credibility — stats and outcomes over responsibilities

rules.name: The No-Accent Rule
rules.body: The palette has no accent color. This is documented as a gap, not justified as restraint. Until an accent is chosen and committed to, do not introduce ad hoc color.

rules.name: The Contrast Floor Rule
rules.body: #888888 on #2b2d2c is 3.9:1. Permissible for large text only (≥18px or bold ≥14px). Never use as body copy color.

rules.name: The One-Mono Rule
rules.body: Ubuntu Mono appears in exactly one context: the hero <code> element. Do not introduce mono type elsewhere. Its rarity is what makes it signal something.

rules.name: The Missing Subtitle Rule
rules.body: The hero stops at 'My name is Brock Major.' with no subtitle. A recruiter in the first five seconds has no idea what Brock does. This is the most urgent content fix on the site.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Do not introduce box-shadow on any component. Elevation is tonal — step the background color up in luminance instead.

dos: Do let specificity carry credibility — '190M+ users reached' and '15K+ patient e-cards sent' are more convincing than five bullet points.
Do introduce one accent color before the next deploy.
Do fix the broken Ubuntu Mono font import in Landing.css (points to http://example.com/fonts/ubuntu.woff).
Do add a hero subtitle that communicates what Brock does in under 10 words.
Do cap the About paragraph line length at 65–75ch.
Do use text-wrap: balance on section h1 headings.
Do verify #888888 stat labels render at ≥18px before shipping.
donts: Don't replicate the 'Hello World!' typewriter hero — it's explicitly on the anti-references list.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards or callouts.
Don't add WebGL, custom cursor effects, or heavy entrance choreography.
Don't add box-shadow to the experience card or any component.
Don't use #888888 at body-text scale (below 18px) — fails WCAG AA.
Don't write the About section in the third person or corporate register.
Don't invent numbered section markers (01, 02, 03) or tiny uppercase eyebrows as default scaffolding.
Don't add a second accent before committing to the first.
